name: @meridian/schemas
description: The framework- and brand-neutral root of the meridian design language: the WebRenderer seam (mount/update/unmount + transport contracts) over the canonical meridian.ui.v1 PanelDescriptor + meridian.theme.v1 Theme. Renderers implement the seam; emitters (aion) produce descriptors. Ships next to @meridian/proto-ts (the generated types, resolved via the Bazel first-party link).
